Completions & Commissioning

01 / OVERVIEW

Vertical Overview

Our Completions and Commissioning team bridges the critical gap between mechanical construction and operations. We develop detailed pre-commissioning checklists, loop-checking protocols, commissioning manuals, and plant operating procedures. Simultaneously, we construct asset databases and maintenance registers, preparing the facility for handovers to operations and integration into SAP PM, Maximo, or CMMS platforms.

Business Value Delivery

We expedite the path to startup by systematically checking and clearing system punch lists, avoiding commissioning delays. Our detailed asset data compilation saves months of operational transition time, allowing operators to run SAP/Maximo from day one.

Key Differentiators

  • CMMS data structured to ISO 14224 standards for asset hierarchies.
  • Systematic mechanical completion tracking using digital commissioning software.
  • Experienced startup operators managing high-risk system energizations.
02 / CAPABILITIES

Specialized Workflows

Commissioning Procedures & Manuals

We write step-by-step operating guidelines for utilities, process columns, flares, and shutdowns, ensuring safe plant startup.

CMMS Asset Register Construction

We compile asset tags, verify attributes, define maintenance spares, and construct SAP/Maximo asset hierarchies for operations.

Reliability & Integrity Engineering

Our reliability engineers conduct Risk-Based Inspections (RBI) to API 580 and Reliability-Centered Maintenance (RCM) reviews.

03 / SECTORS SERVED

Industries Supported

Process Refineries
Offshore Assets
Power Generation Facilities
Desalination Utilities
Renewables Portfolios
04 / EXECUTION TIMELINE

Project Delivery Stages

Interactive tracking of progress gates from bid to delivery handovers.

Stage 01 / System Boundary Definition

We divide the plant layout into commissioning systems and sub-systems.

Stage 02 / Pre-Commissioning Loop Checking

Cold loop testing, instrument calibrations, and piping hydrotests are completed.

Stage 03 / Hot Commissioning & Startup

We introduce feedstock, test operations, and record baseline parameters.

Stage 04 / Asset Handover & CMMS Load

Handovers signed off, and the verified asset register is loaded into SAP/Maximo.

05 / TECH ECOSYSTEM

Software Stack & Toolsets

SAP Plant Maintenance (PM)

CMMS Platform

IBM Maximo Asset Management

EAM System

PHA-Pro

Technical Safety & RBI

Primavera P6

Commissioning Scheduling

Excel Data Tools

Asset Register Structuring
06 / CASE STUDY

Execution in Practice

Desalter System Commissioning & CMMS

The Challenge

A major offshore operator needed to commission a new desalter skid, but lacked an asset structure and spare parts register for their SAP CMMS.

Our Approach

We mapped the desalter piping, instrument loops, and pumps, building a hierarchy matching ISO 14224. We checked off loop tests and compiled the Spare Parts List (SPIR).

The Result

The desalter skid was commissioned on schedule. The verified asset register and spare parts log were loaded into SAP PM, ensuring immediate maintenance operations.

07 / EXECUTED PROJECTS

6,900 Hours Completed
08 / QUESTIONS & ANSWERS

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the difference between Mechanical Completion and Commissioning?

Mechanical Completion verifies construction is correct. Commissioning involves active testing, loop checks, and starting up fluid operations.

What is ISO 14224?

It is the global standard for asset taxonomy, data collection, and reliability mapping in petroleum, petrochemical, and gas industries.

Do you write plant operating manuals?

Yes, we author operating manuals, startup/shutdown procedures, and emergency response procedures.

How do you compile the SPIR spare parts lists?

We parse vendor manuals and drawings, extracting recommended spares, manufacturer details, and part numbers into standardized SPIR sheets.
